name: C-20 consumption trace records multiple --consulted-compliance frameworks in a single trace
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --consulted-compliance gdpr --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -q 'soc2-tsc' trace.json && grep -q 'gdpr' trace.json && echo multi 1>&2
